questions.text: When someone gives you a gift — whether it's your partner, a friend, or family — what's the thing that actually makes it meaningful to you? Is it the thought behind it, something you can use daily, an experience you wouldn't book yourself, or do you have a soft spot for quirky or unexpected gifts?

When you listen to music — say during work, on a walk, or hanging out — do you usually have specific songs/artists in mind, or do you just put on a genre or playlist and let it play? Are you someone who creates their own playlists, or do you mostly rely on algorithm-generated ones?

When it comes to your phone and apps — are you someone who customizes everything with specific launchers, icon packs, and widgets, or do you just roll with whatever default setup came on the device? How particular are you about how your home screen looks and functions?

What's your relationship with creativity and making things — not for work, but just for fun or self-expression? Do you have any creative outlets like writing, making music, building things, photography, or something else?

When you think about the future of where you live — not next year, but say 10+ years out — do you eventually see yourself settling somewhere full-time, or is the nomad lifestyle something you plan to keep indefinitely? What's the vision there?
